节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Sets the input switch status of an input device. Take the touchscreen as an example. If the input switch is off, the touchscreen does not respond when being touched. If the input switch is on, the touchscreen wakes up when being touched. and the value false indicates the opposite. The application does not have the permission required to call the API A non-system application calls a system API. 1. Mandatory parameters are left unspecified; 2. Incorrect parameter types; 3. Parameter verification failed.
注释信息: @param { boolean } enabled - Switch status of the input device. The value true indicates that the input device is enabled,
@returns { Promise<void> } Returns the result through a promise.
@throws { BusinessError } 401 - Input parameter error. Possible causes:
@throws { BusinessError } 3900001 - The specified device does not exist.
节点.return_description: Returns the result through a promise.

error_codes.description: The specified device does not exist.
